frameworks.name: OWASP ASVS
frameworks.description: OWASP ASVS provides a basis for testing web application technical security controls and provides developers with a list of requirements for secure development.

frameworks.name: OWASP SAMM
frameworks.description: SAMM is a prescriptive model, an open framework that is simple to understand, well-defined, and measurable. It helps organizations formulate and implement software security strategies.

frameworks.name: NIST SSDF
frameworks.description: SSDF provides a set of high-level practices that help organizations integrate security into their software development practices.

frameworks.name: NIST CSF 2.0
frameworks.description: The Cybersecurity Framework provides a common language and systematic approach for managing cybersecurity risk.

frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-53
frameworks.description: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations.

frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-34
frameworks.fullName: NIST Contingency Planning Guide for Federal Information Systems
frameworks.description: Contingency Planning Guide for Federal Information Systems, helping organizations develop, implement, and maintain effective contingency plans.

frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-171
frameworks.description: Security requirements for protecting controlled unclassified information in nonfederal systems and organizations.

frameworks.name: CIS Controls v8.1
frameworks.description: A prioritized set of actions to protect organizations and data from known cyber attack vectors.

frameworks.name: CCB CyberFundamentals 2.0
frameworks.description: Belgium CCB CyberFundamentals Framework, helping organizations assess and improve their cybersecurity posture.

frameworks.name: DSOMM
frameworks.description: DevSecOps Maturity Model, helping organizations implement and improve DevSecOps practices.

frameworks.name: BSIMM15
frameworks.description: Software security maturity model, a data-driven assessment framework for software security initiatives.

frameworks.name: NIS 2
frameworks.description: EU Network and Information Security Directive, strengthening cybersecurity requirements across the European Union.

frameworks.name: AIMA
frameworks.description: AI Maturity Assessment Model, helping organizations assess and improve the security and maturity of their AI systems.

frameworks.name: CMMC L1-L2
frameworks.description: US Department of Defense Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification, protecting sensitive information in the defense industrial base supply chain.

frameworks.name: ISO 27001:2022 + Amd1:2024
frameworks.description: Information Security Management Systems standard, providing requirements for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continually improving an ISMS.

frameworks.name: ISO 27002:2022
frameworks.description: Information security controls best practice guidance, providing guidelines for information security controls.

frameworks.name: IEC 62443-4-1
frameworks.fullName: Secure Product Development Lifecycle for IACS
frameworks.description: Secure product development lifecycle requirements for industrial automation and control systems, ensuring security of IACS products.

frameworks.name: SCF
frameworks.description: Secure Controls Framework, providing a unified set of security controls across multiple compliance requirements.

frameworks.name: CCM v4.0
frameworks.description: Cloud Security Alliance Cloud Controls Matrix, providing a cloud security control framework for cloud service providers and users.

frameworks.name: MLPS 2.0
frameworks.description: China's core standard for cybersecurity classified protection, specifying security protection requirements for information systems at different security levels.

frameworks.name: Cybersecurity Law
frameworks.fullName: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (Amended 2025)
frameworks.description: Article-level full-text framework of the PRC Cybersecurity Law (amended in 2025), covering Articles 1-81 for auditable compliance assessment.

frameworks.name: Data Security Law
frameworks.fullName: Data Security Law of the People's Republic of China
frameworks.description: Article-level full-text framework of the PRC Data Security Law, covering Articles 1-55 for auditable data governance and security obligations.

frameworks.name: Personal Information Protection Law
frameworks.fullName: Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China
frameworks.description: Article-level full-text framework of the PRC Personal Information Protection Law, covering Articles 1-74 for auditable privacy compliance assessment.

frameworks.name: NIST SP 800-161
frameworks.fullName: NIST SP 800-161 Rev.1 Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management Practices
frameworks.description: NIST supply chain risk management practices for identifying, assessing, and mitigating cybersecurity supply chain risks.

frameworks.name: PCI DSS
frameworks.fullName: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard v4.0.1
frameworks.description: Payment card security standard for protecting cardholder data and reducing risk in payment environments.

frameworks.name: GDPR
frameworks.description: EU core regulation on personal data protection defining lawful processing, data subject rights, cross-border transfers, and enforcement framework.

frameworks.name: DORA
frameworks.description: EU regulation establishing harmonized ICT risk management, incident reporting, resilience testing, and third-party risk controls for financial entities.

frameworks.name: EU AI Act
frameworks.description: EU AI Act establishes risk-based obligations for prohibited AI practices, high-risk AI systems, general-purpose AI models, and transparency controls.

frameworks.name: Cyber Resilience Act
frameworks.description: EU CRA establishes cybersecurity requirements and vulnerability handling obligations for products with digital elements across the lifecycle.

frameworks.name: OWASP API Top 10:2023
frameworks.description: OWASP API Security Top 10:2023 enumerates the most critical API security risks for secure development, testing, and governance.

frameworks.name: OWASP MASVS 2.1
frameworks.fullName: OWASP Mobile Application Security Verification Standard 2.1
frameworks.description: MASVS 2.1 defines mobile application security verification requirements across architecture, data, communication, authentication, code quality, and runtime resilience.

frameworks.name: OWASP ASVS 5.0
frameworks.description: ASVS 5.0 provides an updated application security verification baseline for requirement-driven design, development, and testing.
